mapper.select:
SELECT c.s_info_compcode AS companyCode ,MAX(c.s_info_compname) AS companyShortName ,MAX(c.s_info_compname) AS companyFullName ,MAX(c.s_info_compind_name1) AS industryName ,MAX(c.s_info_compind_name2) AS industryName2 FROM ais_inv_ods.wind_cbondissuer c
AND c.used = 1 AND c.s_info_compcode IS NOT NULL AND c.s_info_compcode != ''
AND c.s_info_compcode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyCode}, '%')
AND c.s_info_compname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyFullName}, '%')
AND (c.s_info_compind_name1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{industryName}, '%') OR c.s_info_compind_name2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{industryName}, '%'))
GROUP BY c.s_info_compcode

SELECT c.s_info_compcode AS companyCode ,c.s_info_compname AS companyShortName ,c.s_info_compname AS companyFullName ,c.s_info_compind_name1 AS industryName ,c.s_info_compind_name2 AS industryName2 ,c.s_info_compind_name3 AS industryName3 ,c.s_info_compind_name4 AS industryName4 ,c.s_info_comptype AS compType ,c.s_info_compregaddress AS regAddress ,c.is_fin_inst AS isFinInst FROM ais_inv_ods.wind_cbondissuer c WHERE c.s_info_compcode = #{companyCode} AND c.used = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.s_info_compcode AS windCode ,c.s_info_compname AS fullName ,c.s_info_compname AS shortName ,'company' AS securityType ,c.s_info_compind_name1 AS industryName FROM ais_inv_ods.wind_cbondissuer c WHERE c.s_info_compcode = #{companyCode} AND c.used = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,ips.adjust_batch_no ,ips.adjust_log_id ,DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = ips.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'company' INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{companyCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ips.entry_time DESC ,ips.id DESC

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,COUNT(DISTINCT bond.wind_code) AS bondCount ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ips.entry_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM rrs_securityinfo bond INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = bond.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'bond' INNER JOIN ip_pool_status ips ON ips.security_code = bond.wind_code AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE bond.issuer_code = #{companyCode} GROUP BY ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,p.outer_sort ,p.inner_sort ,p.id ORDER BY p.outer_sort ,p.inner_sort ,p.id

SELECT bond.wind_code ,bond.short_name ,bond.full_name ,bond.security_type ,dst.security_type_name ,ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM rrs_securityinfo bond INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = bond.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'bond' INNER JOIN ip_pool_status ips ON ips.security_code = bond.wind_code AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE bond.issuer_code = #{companyCode} ORDER BY bond.wind_code ASC

SELECT bond.* FROM rrs_securityinfo bond INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = bond.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'bond' WHERE bond.issuer_code = #{companyCode} AND (bond.maturity_date IS NULL OR bond.maturity_date > CURDATE()) AND COALESCE(bond.abs_flag, 0) != 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_pool_status ips WHERE ips.security_code = bond.wind_code AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 ) ORDER BY bond.wind_code ASC

SELECT bond.* FROM rrs_securityinfo bond INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = bond.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'bond' INNER JOIN ip_pool_status ips ON ips.security_code = bond.wind_code AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 WHERE bond.issuer_code = #{companyCode} AND COALESCE(bond.abs_flag, 0) != 1 ORDER BY bond.wind_code ASC

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,ips.adjust_batch_no ,ips.adjust_log_id ,DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 )

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,MAX(ips.adjust_batch_no) AS adjustBatchNo ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ips.entry_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate ,COUNT(DISTINCT ips.security_code) AS bondCount FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo sb ON ips.security_code = sb.wind_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sb.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 ) GROUP BY p.id ,ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type
SELECT DISTINCT target_pool_id FROM ip_pool_status WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, security_code, adjust_type, adjust_mode, adjust_batch_no, target_pool_id, flow_id, flow_key, audit_status, adjuster_id, adjust_reason, adjust_advice, submit_time FROM ip_adjust_log WHERE security_code = #{companyCode} AND adjuster_id = #{adjusterId} AND adjust_type = '手工调整' AND audit_status NOT IN ('-1', '99') AND is_deleted = 0 AND submit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{seconds} SECOND) ORDER BY submit_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT occupied.target_pool_id FROM ip_adjust_log manual_log INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step pending_step ON pending_step.adjust_batch_no = manual_log.adjust_batch_no AND pending_step.step_status = 'pending' INNER JOIN ip_adjust_log occupied ON occupied.adjust_batch_no = manual_log.adjust_batch_no AND occupied.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND occupied.is_deleted = 0 WHERE manual_log.security_code = #{companyCode} AND manual_log.adjust_type = '手工调整' AND manual_log.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND manual_log.is_deleted = 0
AND manual_log.adjust_batch_no != #{excludeBatchNo}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT security_code) FROM ip_pool_status WHERE target_pool_id = #{poolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE(ips.entry_time, al.audit_time, ips.crte_time) FROM ip_pool_status ips LEFT JOIN ip_adjust_log al ON al.id = ips.adjust_log_id WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT target_pool_id AS id ,COUNT(DISTINCT security_code) AS currentCount FROM ip_pool_status WHERE audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY target_pool_id

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND al.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND s.step_status = 'pending'

SELECT s.node_label FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND al.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND s.step_status = 'pending' ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC ,s.id ASC ,al.submit_time DESC ,al.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ips.target_pool_id FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = ips.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'company' WHERE ips.security_code = #{companyCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = al.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'company' INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{companyCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND al.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND s.step_status = 'pending'

SELECT s.node_label FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = al.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 AND dst.category_type = 'company' INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{companyCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND al.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND s.step_status = 'pending' ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC ,s.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND p.pool_type IN ('forbidden', 'blacklist') AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT MAX(si.date_exists) FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND si.date_exists IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_adjust_log l WHERE l.audit_status = '20' AND l.adjust_mode = '调入' AND l.is_deleted = 0 AND l.crte_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) AND l.security_code = #{securityCode} AND l.security_type = 'company' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_attachment a WHERE a.table_name = 'ip_adjust_log' AND a.main_id = l.id AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.attachment_category IN ('credit_report_hand', 'credit_report_in', 'credit_report_out') )
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_status SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id ,adjust_log_id ,adjust_batch_no ,flow_node_id ,node_code ,node_label ,node_type ,approval_strategy ,sort_order ,step_status ,handler_id ,handler_name ,process_action ,process_comment ,start_time ,process_time FROM ip_adjust_step WHERE adjust_log_id = #{adjustLogId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id ,adjust_log_id ,adjust_batch_no ,flow_node_id ,node_code ,node_label ,node_type ,approval_strategy ,sort_order ,step_status ,handler_id ,handler_name ,process_action ,process_comment ,start_time ,process_time FROM ip_adjust_step WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT category_type FROM dict_security_type WHERE security_type = #{securityType} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
